# Binod Nagarkoti — Full Stack Developer Portfolio

> Frontend & full stack developer portfolio with projects, experience, blog posts, and contact info.

## Main pages
- [Home](/): Portfolio overview — skills, projects, experience, education, achievements, blog preview, contact
- [Blog posts](/blog): Individual articles at `/blog/{slug}`
